text:

Author: joneum

Log:
  net/rsync-bpc: Update from 3.0.9.9 to 3.0.9.11

  Changelog:

  3.0.9.10
  Fix to only call hardlink reference count checking when -H (preserve_hard_links) is specified.

  3.0.9.11
  Fix to ensure hlink_nlinks is non-NULL before using it.

  Approved by:	mentors (implicit)
